n: Chapter 10.5: The Isle of the Flowers

steps.t: Gandalf has pointed out an island in the Anduin to the west, declaring that the end of Isildur's story can there be told.
Gandalf waits on the island of Tol Send, ready to conclude the story of Isildur and his loss of the Ring.
Gandalf asked you to <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> around you while standing on the isle of Tol Send, as Isildur must have done after swimming a…
